## Instructions
Fill the 5 `sorry`s in /<repo-root>/CausalSmith/CausalSmith/Substrate/FiniteDimL1LinfDuality/Basic.lean WITHOUT changing any statement, signature, or definition. Read the file first. Definitions: `MomentSol p β = {w | ∀ ℓ ≤ β, ∑ j, w j * p j ^ ℓ = if ℓ = 0 then 0 else 1}`, `primalNormSet p β = {s | ∃ w ∈ MomentSol p β, s = ∑ j, |w j|}`, `dualValSet p β = {t | ∃ r, r.natDegree ≤ β ∧ (∀ j, |r.eval (p j)| ≤ 1) ∧ t = |r.eval 1 - r.eval 0|}`.

(1) `dualValSet_nonempty`: witness the zero polynomial `(0 : Polynomial ℝ)`; `natDegree 0 = 0 ≤ β`, `eval _ 0 = 0`, contrast `0`; value `0 ∈` set. (2) `primalNormSet_nonneg`: any `s = ∑ j, |w j| ≥ 0` via `Finset.sum_nonneg`. (3) `primalNormSet_bddBelow`: `⟨0, ...⟩` using (2). (4) `momentSol_nonempty (hp : Function.Injective p) (hβ : β ≤ k)`: the moment map `A : (Fin (k+1) → ℝ) →ₗ[ℝ] (Fin (β+1) → ℝ)`, `A w = fun ℓ => ∑ j, w j * p j ^ (ℓ:ℕ)`, is SURJECTIVE because its transpose `Aᵀ b = fun j => ∑ ℓ, b ℓ * p j ^ ℓ` (node-evaluation of a degree-≤β polynomial) is INJECTIVE: a nonzero poly of degree ≤ β ≤ k has < k+1 roots at the distinct nodes. Search Causalean for `nondegenerate_of_distinct_points` (module Causalean.Stat.Nonparametric.LocalPoly.DesignMatrixPosDef) — it gives exactly this non-degeneracy for distinct points; import it if useful. From surjectivity, obtain a preimage of the target vector `fun ℓ => if (ℓ:ℕ) = 0 then 0 else 1`, then convert the `Fin (β+1)`-indexed equalities into the `∀ ℓ ≤ β` form. Use `LinearMap.surjective` via finrank/rank: for finite-dim, `A` surjective ⟺ `Aᵀ` injective (equal ranks); relevant Mathlib: `LinearMap.range`, rank–nullity, or `Matrix.vandermonde` + `Matrix.rank_transpose`. (5) `primalNormSet_nonempty`: from `momentSol_nonempty` pick `w`, use `∑ j, |w j| ∈ primalNormSet`.

Use lean-lsp tools (lean_goal, lean_leansearch, lean_loogle, lean_local_search, lean_multi_attempt) to find exact lemma names. After editing, run `cd /<repo-root>/CausalSmith && lake build CausalSmith.Substrate.FiniteDimL1LinfDuality.Basic` and confirm zero errors and zero remaining `sorry` in this file.
